headline: Kalanick’s Atoms raises $1.7B in a16z-led round for industrial AI
summary: Among the equity partners in the round are Bain Capital, Fifth Wall, Chemistry, A*, K5 Global, Abstract, SV Angel and Alpha Square Group — as well as Uber, the ride-hailing giant Kalanick co-founded and was forced to exit in 2017.

headline: Uber, Lyft win court block on NYC law requiring notice before firing drivers
summary: A federal judge has ruled that New York City cannot prohibit Uber Technologies and Lyft from deactivating drivers from their apps ‌without advance notice, ruling that the novel law is unconstitutional.  U.S. District Judge Gregory ‌Woods in Manhattan said in a written ruling on Tuesday that the city's law adopted earlier this year benefits ​a small fraction of drivers while interfering with the ride-hailing companies' right to police the safety of their platforms.  "Uber and Lyft are likely to succeed in showing that the law protects a narrow class of drivers and does not advance the broader social or economic interest which ‌the [U.S.] Constitution requires to permit ⁠the severe impairment of their contracts," Woods wrote.

raw.headline: Uber, Lyft win court block on NYC law requiring notice before firing drivers

"Uber and Lyft are likely to succeed in showing that the law protects a narrow class of drivers and does not advance the broader social or economic interest which ‌the [U.S.] Constitution requires to permit ⁠the severe impairment of their contracts," Woods wrote.

headline: Is Uber Technologies (UBER) Undervalued Following Its Delivery Hero Deal?
summary: Event overview and why Uber Technologies stock is in focus Uber Technologies (UBER) is back in the spotlight after agreeing to acquire Delivery Hero in a deal valuing the German company at about €13b, alongside a separate plan to divest overlapping delivery operations. The business combination is set to extend Uber’s delivery footprint to 99 markets worldwide, while overlapping Delivery Hero businesses in 14 markets are earmarked for sale to investment firm SSW Partners to support regulatory...
